verdicts.note: Evidence clearly refers to GitHub throughout.
Evidence describes personal access tokens (fine-grained and classic), GITHUB_TOKEN, GitHub Apps, OAuth Apps with Authorization: Bearer/token header, consistent with Token and OAuth2 methods listed.

Pricing page confirms free tier available for all accounts with API access; auth docs show how to self-generate tokens; rate limits documentation confirms 5,000 req/hr for authenticated users on free tier.
Evidence describes REST API with Authentication and Rate Limits documentation, mentions GraphQL API separately, consistent with type=REST and broad coverage.

The provided evidence does not include any information about the MCP server URL. The URL points to the modelcontextprotocol/servers GitHub repo, but the evidence contains only GitHub API docs and pricing page. Cannot verify whether a dedicated MCP server exists; setting to 'unknown' and keeping URL since it was not proven false.
Evidence confirms free self-serve access with token generation, public API endpoints, and clear authentication mechanisms, supporting buildable-now status.
null is appropriate given buildability is buildable-now and evidence shows no blockers.

revised.name: GitHub
revised.one_liner: GitHub's REST/GraphQL APIs offer broad, free self-serve programmatic access to repos, issues, and workflows via token or OAuth authentication, with an existing official MCP server making agent integration buildable today.

auth_methods.notes: Personal access tokens (fine-grained or classic) or GITHUB_TOKEN in Actions, sent as Authorization: Bearer/token header.
GitHub Apps and OAuth Apps support OAuth2 flows for delegated access.
Some OAuth app endpoints require basic auth using client ID/secret.

revised.self_serve_notes: Free plan accounts can self-generate personal access tokens or register GitHub/OAuth Apps with no payment required; usage subject to rate limits (5,000 req/hr authenticated).

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API covering repos, issues, PRs, actions, orgs, etc. GraphQL API also available separately.

evidence.supports: Describes token-based auth via Authorization header, personal access tokens, GitHub Apps, GITHUB_TOKEN.
Confirms free self-serve access with rate limits (5000 req/hr authenticated).
Confirms free tier available for all accounts including API access.
